message:
feat(agent_mail_bridge): return Result types for write operations with fixture tests

Write operations now surface errors to callers instead of silently
returning None/false:

- send_message() returns Result<MessageId, AgentMailBridgeError>
  instead of Option<MessageId>
- release_files() returns Result<(), AgentMailBridgeError> instead
  of bool
- New AgentMailBridgeError enum with SendFailed and ReleaseFailed
  variants (thiserror derive)
- Read paths (fetch_inbox, reserve_files) remain fail-open with
  unchanged semantics

Adds 6 integration-style tests using shell script fixtures:
test_send_message_returns_id, test_fetch_inbox_parses_messages,
test_reserve_files_granted, test_reserve_files_conflict,
test_release_files_succeeds, test_fail_open_when_agent_mail_unavailable.

Normalized tracing fields from bridge="agent_mail" to
agent_mail=true, action="..." for consistent structured logging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
